benefits: Yield insurance coverage against non-preventable natural risks (drought, flood, pests, diseases). Premium rates: 2% for Kharif crops, 1.5% for Rabi crops, and 5% for commercial/horticultural crops.
eligibility: All farmers, including sharecroppers and tenant farmers growing notified crops in notified areas.

benefits: Direct income support of INR 6,000 per year in three equal installments of INR 2,000 directly into the bank accounts of farming families.
eligibility: All landholding farmer families in the country (subject to certain exclusion criteria like high income taxpayers).

benefits: Provides 40% to 50% subsidy for purchasing agricultural machinery (tractors, power tillers, rotavators, sprayers, drip installation machinery) to small and marginal farmers.
eligibility: Small, marginal, SC/ST, and women farmers holding valid land identification cards.

benefits: Short-term credit for crop cultivation expenses at highly subsidized interest rates (starting from 4% p.a.) up to INR 3,00,000, with flexible repayment terms aligned with crop harvest cycles.
eligibility: Owner cultivators or tenant farmers in Maharashtra holding clear title deeds or land tenancy agreements.

scheme_name: UP Crop Loan Waiver Scheme (Fasal Rin Mochan)
benefits: One-time waiver of agricultural crop loans up to INR 1,00,000 taken from commercial or cooperative banks, helping farmers recover from crop failures due to diseases/droughts.
eligibility: Small and marginal farmers residing and cultivating in Uttar Pradesh who availed crop loans before the notified date.
